function.name: browseSkillMarketplace
function.description: Browse a remote skill registry or list locally installed skills available for export. Provide a RegistryUrl to browse remote skills, or omit it to list local skills.

RegistryUrl.description: Optional. URL of a remote skill registry (must serve an index.json). Omit to list local skills.

Query.description: Optional. Filter skills by name or description keyword.

InstallSkillName.description: Optional. If provided along with RegistryUrl, download and install this skill from the registry.

Overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing skill when installing. Default false.
